name: Feature request
about: New detector, integration, or quality-of-life improvement

## What you'd like to see
A clear description of the feature.

## Why it matters (curator perspective)
What decision would this unblock or accelerate? Which curator workflow does it support?

## Sketch (optional)
If you have ideas about the API surface, schema, or implementation, share them.
